title: Smelt Enchant
description: Datapack that adds a smelt enchantment which gives the furnace smelted version of a block when broken
body:
# The Smelt Enchantment on all tools

Heyy, this is a simple datapack that makes everything you break give out the furnaced smelt version!

<details>
<summary>1.21</summary>

## How does it work
**// New 1.21 Feature //**
Whenever you break a block using the enchant, if the dropped item can be smelted through a furnace, it will.

## How to obtain the enchantment
**// New 1.21 Feature //**
The enchantment can be found in three ways:
- In the enchanting table
- Through villager trading (Doubled Cost)
- On random loot

## Want a better experience?
**// New 1.21 Feature //**
There is now some particles and sounds that happen whenever the enchantment works. They can be toggle on/off using these commands (off is default)
- /function smelt:toggle_particles
- /function smelt:toggle_sounds

## Coming soon
- Restrictions so that only blocks for the right tool work
- Configuration menu in game

</details>

<details>
<summary>Before 1.21</summary>

## How to obtain the enchantment
1. First, you need to get the Flame Ball from killing a blaze. Mind you, there's only a small chance that it will drop it. Looting will help.
2. Then, you will have to hold the Flame Ball in your off hand and the item you want to enchant in your main hand. All of that while standing on an enchanting table.
3. After that, you only need to watch the animation and wait 5 seconds
4. At the end of the timer, you will loose that Flame Ball and will have the enchantment on your tool.

**This video showcases how to enchant and use the smelt enchantment. Some features have been added since its creation.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/P5uRoQtfUBg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## More Information
Every single block that can be put into a furnace will work apart for one exception:
- Every block that would return iron nuggets or gold nuggets such as rails has not been implemented since I found it annoying

</details>






##  Important message
This datapack is the start of a new project of mine which will include more enchants. Don't hesitate to share any feedback you have.

**All my datapacks are compatible together**


**You can modify this datapack to your likings. However, I would appreciate if you could credit me if you use my base code, thank you!**


Have fun!
